name: Three Beans Salad
recipeIngredient: Garlic salt and salt to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the beans and transfer them into a large bowl.
2. Add the chopped onion and green pepper to the bowl with the beans.
3. In a separate small bowl, whisk together the sugar, vinegar, and salad oil until well combined.
4. Pour the dressing over the beans and mix thoroughly to coat evenly.
5. Season with garlic salt and regular salt to taste.
6. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight to allow flavors to meld.
7. Before serving, give the salad a gentle stir to redistribute the dressing.
